title: LLMOrbit: A Circular Taxonomy of Large Language Models -From Scaling Walls to Agentic AI Systems
what_happened: arXiv:2601.14053v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The field of artificial intelligence has undergone a revolution from foundational Transformer architectures to reasoning-capable systems approaching human-level performance. We present LLMOrbit, a comprehensive circular taxonomy navigating the landscape of large language models spanning 2019

title: Building a Fast Multilingual OCR Model with Synthetic Data
what_happened: Hugging Face Blog announced 'Building a Fast Multilingual OCR Model with Synthetic Data', highlighting new developments relevant to AI researchers and practitioners.

title: Physical Intelligence shows robot model with LLM-like generalization, flaws included
what_happened: US start-up Physical Intelligence has introduced π0.7, a new robot foundation model designed to recombine skills learned during training, similar to how a language model reassembles text fragments from its training data. title: The White House weighs whether Anthropic's Mythos is too valuable for the federal government to refuse
what_happened: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is meeting Trump's Chief of Staff Susie Wiles at the White House to end a months-long standoff with the Pentagon. The new Mythos model's cybersecurity chops reportedly opened the door. title: OpenAI Executive Kevin Weil Is Leaving the Company
what_happened: The former Instagram VP is departing the ChatGPT-maker, which is folding the AI science application he led into Codex.
